workflow.name: Repurpose YouTube videos into multi-platform content with OpenAI and Anthropic
workflow.description:
### Advanced Multi-Platform Content Distribution System

**What This Workflow Does:**
- Monitors your YouTube channel for new videos
- Downloads and processes video transcripts
- Uses AI to generate multiple content formats
- Automatically publishes to various platforms
- Handles rate limiting with strategic wait periods

**Content Outputs:**
✂️ Short-form clips (60s scripts)
📝 Blog posts (SEO optimized)
🧵 Twitter/X threads
📱 LinkedIn posts
🎯 SEO-optimized titles & descriptions

**Key Features:**
⏱️ Rate limiting with Wait nodes
🔄 Error handling & retries
🎨 AI-powered content adaptation
📊 Multi-format generation
🚀 Auto-publishing pipeline

**Requirements:**
- YouTube Data API key
- OpenAI/Anthropic API key
- Platform credentials (Twitter, LinkedIn, WordPress)
- Google Drive (optional backup)

**Workflow Stages:**
1️⃣ Video Discovery & Transcript Extraction
2️⃣ AI Content Generation (with rate limiting)
3️⃣ Content Formatting & Optimization
4️⃣ Multi-Platform Publishing

### 📊 Monitoring & Success Tracking

**Metrics Tracked:**
- Videos processed
- Content pieces generated
- Successful publications
- Failed attempts
- API costs
- Processing time

**Logging:**
All content saved to Google Drive for:
- Backup purposes
- Quality review
- Performance analysis
- Future optimization

**Notifications:**
- Slack alerts on completion
- Email summary reports
- Error notifications

**Analytics Integration:**
Track performance across:
- Blog pageviews
- Twitter engagement
- LinkedIn impressions
- SEO rankings

**Optimization Loop:**
Use analytics to:
- Refine AI prompts
- Adjust publishing times
- Identify top-performing formats
- Improve content quality

💡 **Tip:** Adjust wait times based on your API rate limits!

parameters.content:
## 🎬 YouTube Content Repurposing Engine
### Advanced Multi-Platform Content Distribution System

**What This Workflow Does:**
- Monitors your YouTube channel for new videos
- Downloads and processes video transcripts
- Uses AI to generate multiple content formats
- Automatically publishes to various platforms
- Handles rate limiting with strategic wait periods

**Content Outputs:**
✂️ Short-form clips (60s scripts)
📝 Blog posts (SEO optimized)
🧵 Twitter/X threads
📱 LinkedIn posts
🎯 SEO-optimized titles & descriptions

**Key Features:**
⏱️ Rate limiting with Wait nodes
🔄 Error handling & retries
🎨 AI-powered content adaptation
📊 Multi-format generation
🚀 Auto-publishing pipeline

**Requirements:**
- YouTube Data API key
- OpenAI/Anthropic API key
- Platform credentials (Twitter, LinkedIn, WordPress)
- Google Drive (optional backup)

**Workflow Stages:**
1️⃣ Video Discovery & Transcript Extraction
2️⃣ AI Content Generation (with rate limiting)
3️⃣ Content Formatting & Optimization
4️⃣ Multi-Platform Publishing

## 📊 Monitoring & Success Tracking

**Metrics Tracked:**
- Videos processed
- Content pieces generated
- Successful publications
- Failed attempts
- API costs
- Processing time

**Logging:**
All content saved to Google Drive for:
- Backup purposes
- Quality review
- Performance analysis
- Future optimization

**Notifications:**
- Slack alerts on completion
- Email summary reports
- Error notifications

**Analytics Integration:**
Track performance across:
- Blog pageviews
- Twitter engagement
- LinkedIn impressions
- SEO rankings

**Optimization Loop:**
Use analytics to:
- Refine AI prompts
- Adjust publishing times
- Identify top-performing formats
- Improve content quality

💡 **Tip:** Adjust wait times based on your API rate limits!

## 📡 Stage 1: Video Discovery & Transcript Extraction

**Purpose:**
Identify new videos and extract their transcripts for AI processing.

**Process:**
1. Query YouTube API for latest videos from your channel
2. Filter for videos published in last 24 hours
3. Extract video IDs and metadata
4. Fetch video transcripts (captions/subtitles)
5. Clean and format transcript data

**Data Flow:**
Schedule Trigger → Fetch Videos → Filter New → Get Transcripts → Clean Text

**Important Notes:**
- YouTube API has quota limits (10,000 units/day)
- Each search request costs 100 units
- Transcript fetching requires additional API calls
- Store processed video IDs to avoid duplicates

**Output:**
Clean transcript text ready for AI processing

## 🤖 Stage 2: AI Content Generation (with Rate Limiting)

**Purpose:**
Generate multiple content formats using AI while respecting API rate limits.

**AI Tasks:**
1. **Short-form Scripts** - 60-second video scripts for TikTok/Reels/Shorts
2. **Blog Posts** - 1500-2000 word SEO-optimized articles
3. **Social Threads** - Twitter/X thread format (8-12 tweets)
4. **LinkedIn Posts** - Professional format with hooks
5. **SEO Titles** - 5 variations optimized for search

**Rate Limiting Strategy:**
- **Wait Node 1:** After blog post generation (60 seconds)
  - Prevents API throttling
  - Allows cooling period
- Processing continues in parallel after wait

**AI Model Selection:**
- GPT-4 for blog posts (better quality)
- Claude for threads (better structure)
- GPT-3.5 for titles (cost-effective)

**Output:**
Structured content objects ready for formatting

## ✨ Stage 3: Content Formatting & Optimization

**Purpose:**
Structure AI-generated content for platform-specific requirements.

**Formatting Tasks:**

**1. Blog Post Formatting:**
- Extract title, meta description, headings
- Format as HTML/Markdown
- Add featured image placeholders
- Insert internal links
- Add SEO schema markup

**2. Thread Formatting:**
- Split into individual tweets
- Add thread numbering (1/12, 2/12...)
- Ensure character limits (280 chars)
- Add hashtags strategically

**3. LinkedIn Post:**
- Professional tone adjustment
- Add emojis for readability
- Include CTA and hashtags
- Format with line breaks

**4. SEO Title Generation:**
- Create 5 variations
- Optimize for keywords
- Keep under 60 characters

**Output:**
Platform-ready content objects

## 🚀 Stage 4: Multi-Platform Publishing

**Purpose:**
Distribute formatted content to various platforms automatically.

**Publishing Destinations:**

**📝 Blog (WordPress/Medium/Ghost):**
- Publish via REST API
- Set as draft or published
- Add featured image
- Schedule for optimal time
- Add categories/tags

**🐦 Twitter/X:**
- Post thread sequentially
- Add media attachments
- Monitor rate limits (300 posts/3hrs)
- Use Twitter API v2

**💼 LinkedIn:**
- Post via LinkedIn API
- Add article link
- Tag company page
- Optimal posting time: Tue-Thu 10am

**📱 Additional Platforms:**
- Facebook Pages API
- Instagram (via Graph API)
- Medium (via API)
- Dev.to

**Error Handling:**
- Retry failed posts (3 attempts)
- Log all publishing events
- Send notifications on failure

**Wait Node 2:**
Staggered publishing (5 min intervals) to avoid spam detection

user.name: Oneclick AI Squad
user.bio: The AI Squad Initiative is a pioneering effort to build, automate and scale AI-powered workflows using n8n.io. Our mission is to help individuals and businesses integrate AI agents seamlessly into their daily operations  from automating tasks and enhancing productivity to creating innovative, intelligent solutions. We design modular, reusable AI workflow templates that empower creators, developers and teams to supercharge their automation with minimal effort and maximum impact.

data.details: The Code node allows you to execute JavaScript in your workflow.

The Filter node can be used to filter items based on a condition. If the condition is met, the item will be passed on to the next node. If the condition is not met, the item will be omitted. Conditions can be combined together by AND(meet all conditions), or OR(meet at least one condition).
